items.description:
Get the evil version: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/5410125028/Noob-Scarf

Buy this item here to earn KaChing which can be spent on our exclusive UGC! https://www.roblox.com/games/91081142132093/Avatar-Central-Earn-UGC-By-Creating-Outfits

If the goal of a scarf is to keep your neck warm, and this is a noob scarf...does that mean it will not keep your neck warm ? 

Get all my Noob items! https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=noob&Category=13&CreatorName=Reverse_Polarity&SortType=3
